titleStmt.title: SII 6.1116: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 1116. (A.R. No. 349-B of 1899). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . śākābdē nāgaratnāruṇaparigaṇitē caitramāsē daśamyā
ṁ kṛṣṇāyāṁ sōmavārē hariśikharipatēryyāvadācaṁdratāraṁ . sēvārttha
ṁ ṣaṇnibaṁdhān pratidinamadadāt sūryadēvātmajātaḥ svābhīṣṭā
vāptayē jīyyanapadamahitassōmanāthōguṇāḍhyaḥ . śrīśakavaru
ṣaṁbulu 1298 gunēṁṭi caitra kṛṣṇa dasamiyu sōmavāramu
nāṁḍu poṭnurivīṭi sururjujīyyana koḍuku kaḷiṁgamaji sōma
yijīyyana tanakabhīṣṭārtthasiddhigā śrīnarasiṁhanāthuniki nityamu
ṁ goluvanu Āṟu nibaṁdalu peṭenu . tittirisiṁgunēnāpatikini tiru
mālanibaṁdhamu 1 maḷivaradunāyuniki Ālāvaṭamu 1 tiruvarddha
jāmappuḍu taḷapurayināyuniki divyakōla nibaṁda 1 Ī mu
vurunnu māḷaUllāgi modalu caṁdanalagi Ayinaṁdaṁkaṁ goluvaṁgalāru
Esinikucana koḍuku narasiṁhyanaku ṟēpē tirumajanamu kuṁḍaṁḍu te
cci peṭṭanu niṁbada 1 reṁḍu saṁpradayala vāsyakāṁṛru prabhātasamayamaṁdu ma
ṁgaḷagītālu mōhari goluvanu peṭṭina prasādakuṁcālu reṁḍu 2 Ī nibaṁdālu nāli
ṁṭikini gaṁḍamāḍālu 20 . vāsyakaṁṛraku māḍalu 8 mūḍu tiru
vajāmappuḍu tirumāla Atupasi nālumuḍlu tecciveṭaṁgālāṁḍu . Ī dharmmu
vu śrīvaiṣṇava rakṣa śrīśrīśrī
Lines 18 to 21 are written above the inscription on a separatesōmayijīyana maṟedi śrībhaṁḍāramu padma
nidhi gaṁḍamāḍālu Enimidi māḍalu peṭṭi nitya
munnu tiruvarddhabāmappuḍu reṁḍu pānaUka
lasalu Āragiṁpanu basavaṇagā (.) jēśenu śrī
Digital edition of SII 6.1116 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
